name: Apricot Flan (Valais)
recipeInstructions:
(Units: 1000 g = 36 oz., 1 oz = 28 g, 1 in = 25.4 mm, 1 dl = 3.5 fl oz)
1. Wash the apricots and cut them into halves, removing any stones.
2. Arrange the apricot halves, skin uppermost, in a gratin dish in two layers, sprinkling some sugar between the layers.
3. In a bowl, beat together the eggs, sugar, salt, vanilla sugar, and cream until well combined.
4. Cover the apricots with the egg mixture.
5. Place the dish in a bain-marie (water bath) and bake at 180°C for 30-40 minutes.
6. Dust the flan with icing sugar and serve from the dish.
7. Serve hot or cold, optionally accompanied by a small amount of whipped cream.
Note: This recipe is inspired by the Culinary Art and Traditions of Switzerland as documented in Pro Gastronomia, 1992.
